text.title: OpenAPI Specification Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply OpenAPI Specification end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: establish-canonical-source
step.action: Decide spec source: hand-authored vs server-generated; pick one canonical path.
step.decision-gate: Reject more than one source path.

step.name: author-base-spec
step.action: Draft paths, operations with operationId, components/* for reusable parts.

step.name: wire-linters
step.action: Configure redocly + Spectral; enable required-array, no-additionalProperties-true on responses, named-examples-required.

step.name: wire-breaking-gate
step.action: Add oasdiff breaking to CI; classify BREAK = human override required.
step.decision-gate: PR cannot merge with un-acknowledged BREAK.

step.name: snapshot-drift-check
step.action: Add `regenerate && diff` step in CI; fail on drift.
step.decision-gate: Build fails if regenerated spec differs from committed copy.
